overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a Western industrial dock and railway station. The character moves from a wooden cargo platform along railway tracks and into a covered station area on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock platform with stacked cargo

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock platform past cargo crates and barrels

notable_agents.action: worker standing beside stacked wooden crates

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the walkway
large industrial structure with green metal framework and glass windows
stacks of wooden shipping crates and boxes
body of water alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock platform lined with cargo crates and barrels. The green industrial building of M. Madison & Co. dominates the background while a few workers stand around the cargo. The bright midday sun casts strong shadows across the weathered wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open railway yard with multiple tracks

events.description: character steps off wooden dock onto gravel ground beside railway tracks
character begins walking directly on the wooden railway ties

agents.ego_description: walking along the railway tracks through the industrial railyard, passing stationary freight cars

notable_agents.action: man walking in opposite direction along the tracks

entered.detail: wooden railway ties with steel rails
weathered red wooden boxcars on parallel track
gravel and dirt between railway tracks

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open railway yard where the character walks along the tracks. Red wooden boxcars sit on parallel tracks to the right, while industrial buildings and smokestacks rise in the distance. The ground is covered in gravel and patches of grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered train station platform with iron columns

events.description: character enters covered train station platform with green iron roof structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered station area, passing by waiting passengers on the platform

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress and hat standing on platform

entered.detail: green painted iron and glass roof structure covering the platform
green iron pillars supporting the station roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered train station platform with a high green iron and glass roof. Sunlight filters through the structure creating dappled shadows on the cobblestone platform. Passengers wait near wooden benches while the railway tracks run alongside the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched industrial cargo dock into the sheltered interior of a railway station. It begins on a weathered wooden platform lined with crates and barrels, moving past the green facade of the M. Madison & Co. building under the harsh midday sun. As the character leaves the dock, the scene opens into a wide railway yard where the camera tracks along gravel paths and grass beside a line of red wooden boxcars and distant smokestacks. The movement then shifts toward the station, transitioning from the open air into a covered platform beneath a high green iron and glass roof. Finally, the lighting softens into dappled shadows across cobblestones as the camera passes waiting passengers and wooden benches.
